notes: Dashboard polish + fixes: Player Data blank-window bug fixed (wrong route). Biomes Walked chips are clickable and biome-coloured, linking through to filtered Valheim Data. Boss count now derives from boss trophies (x/7) — the raw boss_kills save value was unreliable. New Achievements row — Bosses, Runestones Read, Recipes Mastered, Worlds Explored. Copy-to-clipboard button on every item in the grid, table and detail page. Norse font now on every page heading. Player-data sync watcher runs globally and refreshes the local store on every .fch change so stats stay live.
